title: Curse sets opponent creature AL to one

card.rawText: All creatures on your opponent's side of the field have their AL reduced to 1. This card supersedes other AL increases.

plan.title: Curse sets opponent creature AL to one
plan.summary: Place Curse as field magic and verify opponent primary effective AL is set to 1.

notes: Place Curse in player_1 field magic slot as field-active.
Set player_2 primary to an AL6 creature.

steps: Player 1 plays Curse as field magic.
manualVerification: Confirm the aura applies only to opponent creatures.
riskNotes: Layer priority with other AL increases is covered by a separate suppression effect.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
